product_name: So Slime DIY Slime'spresso Café Slime Making Machine

bullets: Open your own slime Café! Mix batches of slime for your friends and family, decorate your café cups, then serve up the fun
Brew a Cuppa’ Stretchy Slime! A brand-new way to make a batch of slime, the So Slime Slime’Licious Slime’Spresso machine mixes a perfect batch of slime every time

Mixing Slime Has never “Bean” So Much Fun! Pour the slime powder into a café container you’ve decorated yourself, press the handle to activate the electronic mixer, select and stir in your decorations, and “serve it up”.
So Much Slime! Kit includes everything you need to mix 10 batches of multi-colored slime as well as 5 bags of premade slime
Includes Slime’Spresso Machine, 10 bags of slime powder, 5 bags of pre-made slime, 8 bags of decorations, 3 slime containers, 1 recipe card, 3 mixing tools, and 1 decorative sticker sheet
content.description: Order up! Open your very own slime café with the So Slime Slime’licious Slime’Spresso Machine!. Pour the slime powder into a café container you’ve decorated yourself, place it beneath the mixer, then press the handle forward to “brew” a perfect batch of slime every time! Then select and stir in decorations to create your own custom concoctions. Includes Slime’Spresso Machine, 10 bags of slime powder in 5 different colors, 5 bags of pre-made slime, 8 bags of decorations, 3 slime containers, 1 recipe card, 3 mixing tools, and 1 sticker sheet.

attributes.whats_in_box: 10 bags of slime powder, 5 bags premade slime, 8 bags of decorations, 3 mini slime containers, 1 recipe card, 3 mixing tools, 1 sticker sheet
